items.title: Docs: audited financial figures show OpenAI spent $34B in 2025, up 172% YoY, including $19B on research and development and nearly $6B on sales and marketing (Ed Zitron/Ed Zitron's Where's Your Ed At)
items.title_original: Docs: audited financial figures show OpenAI spent $34B in 2025, up 172% YoY, including $19B on research and development and nearly $6B on sales and marketing (Ed Zitron/Ed Zitron's Where's Your Ed At)
items.title_en: Docs: audited financial figures show OpenAI spent $34B in 2025, up 172% YoY, including $19B on research and development and nearly $6B on sales and marketing (Ed Zitron/Ed Zitron's Where's Your Ed At)
items.title_zh: 文件：经审计的财务数据显示，OpenAI 在 2025 年花费了 340 亿美元，同比增长 172%，其中包括 190 亿美元用于研发，近 60 亿美元用于销售和营销（Ed Zitron/Ed Zitron 的Where's Your Ed At）
items.title_bilingual: 文件：经审计的财务数据显示，OpenAI 在 2025 年花费了 340 亿美元，同比增长 172%，其中包括 190 亿美元用于研发，近 60 亿美元用于销售和营销（Ed Zitron/Ed Zitron 的Where's Your Ed At） / Docs: audited financial figures show OpenAI spent $34B in 2025, up 172% YoY, including $19B on research and development and nearly $6B on sales and marketing (Ed Zitron/Ed Zitron's Where's Your Ed At)

items.title: Italy's AGCM opens a probe into Apple under the DSA, saying rival cloud providers should get free iOS and iPadOS interoperability and iCloud-equivalent access (Cristina Carlevaro/Reuters)
items.title_original: Italy's AGCM opens a probe into Apple under the DSA, saying rival cloud providers should get free iOS and iPadOS interoperability and iCloud-equivalent access (Cristina Carlevaro/Reuters)
items.title_en: Italy's AGCM opens a probe into Apple under the DSA, saying rival cloud providers should get free iOS and iPadOS interoperability and iCloud-equivalent access (Cristina Carlevaro/Reuters)
items.title_zh: 意大利 AGCM 根据 DSA 对苹果展开调查，称竞争对手的云提供商应获得免费的 iOS 和 iPadOS 互操作性以及 iCloud 等效访问权限（Cristina Carlevaro/路透社）
items.title_bilingual: 意大利 AGCM 根据 DSA 对苹果展开调查，称竞争对手的云提供商应获得免费的 iOS 和 iPadOS 互操作性以及 iCloud 等效访问权限（Cristina Carlevaro/路透社） / Italy's AGCM opens a probe into Apple under the DSA, saying rival cloud providers should get free iOS and iPadOS interoperability and iCloud-equivalent access (Cristina Carlevaro/Reuters)
